summary: Normalize SkillRL seeded cold-start state to the runtime export shape, preserve seeded fidelity metadata, and align dashboard SkillRL APIs with seeded/live reporting semantics.
root_cause: The new seeded cold-start path wrote a shape and metadata contract that downstream dashboard routes did not decode or report honestly, causing seeded state to be misrepresented as live or unavailable.
fix_approach: Converted the seed file to the SkillBank export format, preserved seeded metadata during load/save, added a shared dashboard SkillRL state loader, and updated route/test expectations to distinguish seeded from live state.

validation.notes: SkillRL cold-start seeding and dashboard API reporting now agree on seeded vs live fidelity.
